title: How To Lower Blood Pressure Naturally — The 3-Corner Framework From An ICU/ER RN
excerpt: Twenty years in ICU and ER taught me one thing the medical system doesn't say out loud: your blood pressure is being driven by three pressures, and your medication is only touching one of them. Here's the complete natural-protocol framework — what to do, what to skip, what to expect, and when to involve your doctor.

title: Blood Sugar and Blood Pressure: The Third Corner Most Doctors Won't Test For
excerpt: Insulin resistance is a blood-pressure problem hiding under a different name. An ICU/ER nurse walks through how high blood sugar drives every mechanism behind high BP, the 4 labs your doctor should be running, and the protocol that flips this corner in 30 days.

title: Hydration and Blood Pressure: Why The Water You Drink Today Is For Tomorrow
excerpt: Most people are chronically dehydrated and don't know it. An ICU/ER nurse explains the 24-hour delay nobody told you about, why waking at night to pee actually means dehydration, and the gallon-with-salt protocol that drops blood pressure faster than most pills.

title: Cortisol and Blood Pressure: The Stress Hormone Driving Your Numbers
excerpt: Most doctors won't mention the cortisol corner of the BP Triangle. It's the one input you can move the fastest. An ICU/ER RN walks through the mechanism, the 3 fixes, and the 5-minute test that tells you if cortisol is your corner.

title: The 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge Starts May 1 — Here's What's Inside
excerpt: The 30-Day Blood Pressure Reset Challenge launches May 1. Daily coaching, weekly live sessions, a complete herb protocol, and a community doing it alongside you. Early-bird: $97 (regular $297).

title: Why Your Blood Pressure Is Still High (And What Your Pill Doesn't Touch)
excerpt: 72% of people on blood pressure medication haven't reached their target numbers. An ICU/ER RN explains the 4 root-cause mechanisms driving your BP — and what the pill leaves completely untouched.
